examples: She was uplifted by a sudden feeling that he looked quite beautiful in spite of his thinness.
We have shifted to thinness as our new mark of virtue.
Our obsession with thinness is also fueled by health concerns.
The satire is biting, unmasking the thinness of so much of our modern interaction.
He explained that the thinness combined with the tapered edges made for an easy slide into a pocket.
